title: Heat and Temperature
subtitle: Chapter 9: Heat and Temperature — NEB Class 11

content.text: Heat: A form of energy that transfers due to temperature difference. Temperature: A measure of the degree of hotness or coldness.
Conduction (through material), Convection (fluid movement), Radiation (electromagnetic waves, no medium required).

content.name: Expansion Types
content.formula: \Delta L = L_0\alpha\Delta T \quad \Delta A = A_0\beta\Delta T \quad \Delta V = V_0\gamma\Delta T

content.name: Heat & Phase Change
content.note: c = specific heat capacity; L = latent heat (fusion or vaporization).

content.text: Principle: Heat Lost = Heat Gained (in an isolated system).
